zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Rokewood於1536年出生在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓時，她的父親Roger Rookwood Esq.35歲，母親Olivia Wichingham22歲。她於1556年與Christopher Calthorpe Esquire在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1606年7月8日之前在英國諾福爾可考可索普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Rokewood于1536年出生在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓时，她的父亲Roger Rookwood Esq.35岁，母亲Olivia Wichingham22岁。她于1556年与Christopher Calthorpe Esquire在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1606年7月8日之前在英国諾福爾可考可索普。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Rokewood was born in 1536, in Euston, Suffolk, England, her father, Roger Rookwood Esq., was 35 and her mother, Olivia Wichingham, was 22. She married Christopher Calthorpe Esquire in 1556, in Euston, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died before 8 July 1606, in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Rokewood est née en 1536, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Rookwood Esq., avait 35 ans et sa mère, Olivia Wichingham, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Calthorpe Esquire en 1556, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée avant 8 juillet 1606, à Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Rokewood 1536 in Euston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Roger Rookwood Esq. 35 und ihre Mutter Olivia Wichingham 22. Sie hat 1556 in Euston, Suffolk, England Christopher Calthorpe Esquire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb vor 8. Juli 1606 in Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Rokewood è nata il nel 1536 nel Euston, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Roger Rookwood Esq., aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Olivia Wichingham, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Calthorpe Esquire nel 1556, nel Euston, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 8 luglio 1606, nel Cockthorpe, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Rokewoodが1536年にイギリススフォルクエウストンで生まれた時，父Roger Rookwood Esq.は35歳，母Olivia Wichinghamは22歳であった。1556年にイギリススフォルクエウストンでChristopher Calthorpe Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1606年7月8日以前にイギリスノーフォルクコクソルペで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Rokewood(이)가 1536년 영국 수폴크 우스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Roger Rookwood Esq.(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Olivia Wichingham(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1556년 영국 수폴크 우스턴에서 Christopher Calthorpe Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1606년 7월 8일 이전 영국 노르폴크 콕소에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Rokewood nasceu em 1536, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Rookwood Esq., tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Wichingham, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Calthorpe Esquire em 1556, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 8 de julho de 1606, em Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Rokewood родилась в 1536 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Roger Rookwood Esq. было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Olivia Wichingham, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Calthorpe Esquire в 1556 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла перед 8 июля 1606 г. в местности кокктаурп, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Rokewood nació en 1536, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Rookwood Esq., tenía 35 años y su mamá, Olivia Wichingham, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Christopher Calthorpe Esquire en 1556, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 8 de julio de 1606, en Cockthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
